label: fabricated
reason: No such EPA rule exists; 40 CFR §120 is not the WOTUS regulation, and a blanket exemption allowing wetland fill without Army Corps notice contradicts CWA §404 statutory requirements.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EPA rule exists; 40 CFR §120 is not the WOTUS regulation, and the described blanket exemption from CWA §404 for filling wetlands without Army Corps notice contradicts statutory requirements and the post-Sackett regulatory framework.
